options.a: A low pressure area with colder air compared to its surroundings. It can be found by looking at upper contour charts.
options.b: A high pressure area with colder air compared to its surroundings. It can be found by looking at upper contour charts.
options.c: A low pressure area with colder air compared to its surroundings. It can be found by looking at lower contour charts.
options.d: A high pressure area with colder air compared to its surroundings. It can be found by looking at lower contour charts.
